name: Bortled Favorite (Moderate)
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

An Isgeri specialty from Etran's Folly, this root vegetable porridge was named after the dwarf trader Bort Bargith. When you eat this porridge, you can for an additional 20 minutes during exploration. This lasts for 24 hours or until you make your next daily preparations, whichever comes first.
